name: Ed Markey (personal)
subject: short email for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| | | A quick update for you, team: With Congressman Joe Kennedy III in the race, we're facing TWO primary opponents. The funds we raise now will make a huge impact on our campaign come Primary Day. But if we fall short of these early goals, we could see ourselves falling short of victory. So I have to ask you: _**[will you pitch in $27 or more before midnight and help us reach this week's fundraising goal?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112019_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

\-- Ed Markey

Michael isn't a celebrity politician. He's focused on real solutions for the problems affecting millions of Americans.

He knows that we can win this election the same way he always has: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.

[Team, it's also been reported that there's a record number of undecided voters in this race. It's crucial that we have the resources to get Michael's message to them!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9fc/134673f2/9a339bd/6997aa35/1204452517/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_112019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c4/3eb3e2fc/5737ed22/744d70c1/2610357879/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b4_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c4/3eb3e2fc/5737ed22/744d70c0/2610357879/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b4_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c4/3eb3e2fc/5737ed22/744d70cf/2610357879/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b4_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm about to walk on stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I'll be taking the stage for tonight's debate in a few moments. I couldn't be more thankful for this opportunity. It is truly an honor to be able to speak before a national audience as a candidate for President of the United States.
I'm also savoring the moment. I haven't yet qualified for the next DNC debate in December and **this could very well be my last debate.**
I feel that I still have a lot to contribute to this race. Everywhere I go, we've seen a groundswell of support for our message and the values we're fighting for. This is what inspires me to keep going, even when we have tough challenges ahead of us. I have every intention of winning this primary and becoming your Democratic nominee, but right now the DNC's debate thresholds are a major obstacle that stands in our way.
My team tells me we're only a few thousand donors short of the 200,000 we need to be on stage for the December debate.
**Here 's a link if you can step up to help us get there: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191120_CB_20191120-fr-CB-predebate-actives_ndnrs_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I hope to make you proud tonight. And I can only hope that I'll have the chance to make you proud during the next debate too.
Can't do this without you.
Cory
| Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d2c/5fca0d19/79028dff/291c41de/763589006/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d2c/5fca0d19/79028dff/291c41dd/763589006/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d2c/5fca0d19/79028dff/291c41dc/763589006/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d2c/5fca0d19/79028dff/291c41db/763589006/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d2c/5fca0d19/79028dff/291c41da/763589006/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d2c/5fca0d19/79028dff/291c41de/763589006/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW poll today: The more Americans see, the more they oppose impeachment
body:
If you’re finding it difficult to keep up with all the noise surrounding House Democrats’ ever-changing impeachment saga, you’re not alone. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=613e4812f3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 20, 2019
---
| | |
# **NEW poll today: The more Americans see, the more they oppose impeachment**

**If you’re finding it difficult** to keep up with all the noise surrounding House Democrats’ ever-changing impeachment saga, you’re not alone. Democrats themselves are having a tough time keeping their stories straight lately.

**First, the left** had an alleged “quid pro quo” in mind. When that argument didn’t poll well, Democrat leaders changed the accusation to “extortion.” Next came “bribery,”—then back to the original “quid pro quo” catchphrase this morning.

**Yes, it’s dizzying.** Democrats in Congress right now are throwing every accusation they can think of at the wall, crossing their fingers that something finally sticks. That isn’t a new trick: It’s actually been their only real action item since Election Day 2016.

**🎬****President Trump:**[“I want nothing. I want no quid pro quo.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d6ce6ece13&e=3ee4985eea)

**Today turned out** to be a bad day for Democrats and their media echo chamber to resurrect the old “quid pro quo” narrative. In lengthy testimony before Congress today, Ambassador to the European Union Gordon Sondland put that false accusation to rest.

**When Rep.** **Adam Schiff** (D-CA) tried to put words in Ambassador Sondland’s mouth, the Ambassador was crystal clear: “President Trump, when I asked him the open-ended question—as I testified previously, ‘What do you want from Ukraine?’—his answer was, ‘I want nothing.’”

**No matter how the left** tries to spin it, that is the only relevant takeaway from today’s sham hearing. Why? First, because it’s based in fact, not third-party conjecture. Second, it was stated under oath by the _only_ person in these hearings who has ever even spoken directly to President Trump. The other witnesses could only offer opinion and speculation.

**And just like that,** the Swamp’s carefully choreographed narrative collapsed—again.

**The big problem** for House Democrats is that after weeks of testimony, they still have _no actual evidence_ to justify effectively shutting down Congress to put Americans through this charade. New polling out today from Marquette University Law School shows that Americans in Wisconsin, for example, now oppose impeaching and removing President Trump by _double-digit margins_.

**But Democrats** from Impeachment Czar Schiff to far-left “Squad” member Rep. Rashida Tlaib (D-MI) already promised their base that they would impeach President Trump—so no matter what the facts or evidence say, the show must go on.

**Even Speaker Nancy Pelosi** is beginning to sense how bad this looks for her party. [**In a desperate letter**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b38ed8efb6&e=3ee4985eea) to colleagues, she encouraged Democrats to stick with the plan—and put in writing that it would be a “weak response” to wait until next year’s election to let the American people decide for themselves who their President should be.

**Democrats have told us** repeatedly they have no interest in a fair, impartial hearing. It’s time to take them at their word. Fortunately, a majority of Americans may already have.

[“At impeachment hearing, irrelevant opinions by Trump critics masquerade as facts”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc83d4eeff&e=3ee4985eea)

**Must-read:** [Full statement from Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8280185b55&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: Steve Chabot
subject: So How's the Impeachment Going?
body:
Flawed, biased and a waste of time... No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [So How's the Impeachment Going?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Democrats impeachment process is a flawed and biased charade. In this week's blog, I discuss how the impeachment proceedings are going and how they differ from the last successful presidential impeachment, Bill Clinton in 1998. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Remembering My Mom](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-d/)
My mom, Doris Leona Tilley Chabot, passed away a week ago today, at the age of 95. In this week's blog, I remember my Mom, a victory belle from the greatest generation. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Camp David](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-u/)
This past weekend I was humbled to be a guest at Camp David. Steeped in mystery, this decades old presidential retreat has an amazing history. In this week's blog, I write about how a place known as Shangri-La became Camp David, and you won't want to miss what I found written in a book in my cabin! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Is Hillary Going to Run Again?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-n/)
Hillary is still out there claiming she won the presidential election, and now she's making noises that she might run again in 2020. Besides Hillary, there are also rumors of several other candidates that still might jump into the Democrat's primary pool - Michelle Obama, Oprah? In this week's blog, I let you know what I think of Hillary's and other potential candidate's chances of jumping in. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhkjtdk-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: No one else on stage is saying this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Are you watching the debate, right now? Tom talked about something you’ll never hear from Washington, D.C. insiders: **term limits****.**
---
**"It’s time to push power back to the American people and take power away from the corporations who bought our government. I’m talking about structural reform in Washington, D.C. — term limits. You’re going to have to have new and different people in charge. I’m the _only_ person on this stage who will talk about term limits."**

---
Our government has been hijacked by special interests and corporate greed. Our government has been hijacked by special interests and corporate greed. subject: Show them we won’t be silenced

body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3366%2E377263%2Eol5efU) Yang Gang --

During the first 30 minutes of the Democratic debate, MSNBC called on Andrew Yang a total of ZERO times.

It’s clear if the American people are going to hear our message it HAS to be because of our people-powered grassroots organization. That means putting up ads and sharing Andrew’s ideas directly.

clean_body: | | Hi Friend, For 15 years, Oregonians have been fighting against the Jordan Cove Fracked Gas Pipeline and LNG Export Terminal in southern Oregon. It is time for our elected officials to take a stand. Check out our new video featuring supporters across the district who are unified against this fossil fuel project and who are fighting for a renewable future. | Join us as we call on every candidate and elected official, from the Governor's Office, to the State House, to the counties and even to our current Congressional Representative to stand with us against Jordan Cove LNG! I am the only candidate not taking any corporate PAC or fossil fuel money. Onward, Doyle Canning | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Cory Booker
subject: Friend, just walking off stage for what could be my last debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
No matter what, I can't tell you how much your support means to me -- especially in moments like this.
| | |
---
| Friend, As I leave the DNC debate stage in Atlanta, I'm filled with an enormous sense of gratitude -- for every single one of you who helped get me here. I also feel a responsibility -- to you and the whole team -- to do everything I can to make sure this isn't our last debate. We have a powerful, one-of-a-kind message for our country's future. **A message of love and courageous empathy that we 've seen resonate with voters who, more than anything, want to feel inspired again. [A message that will always drive our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191120_CB_20191120-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** But, to be frank: Unless we can hit the DNC's donor and polling thresholds required to qualify for the December debate, tonight might have been the last time you see me up there on a stage like that. **[If, after tonight, you want to make sure I get a chance to be part of the next debate, make a donation today and we'll put it directly to use.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191120_CB_20191120-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** No matter what, I can't tell you how much your support means to me -- especially in moments like this. Thank you,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191120_CB_20191120-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d28/5fca0d19/79088a4d/291c40b3/3808134287/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d28/5fca0d19/79088a4d/291c40b2/3808134287/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d28/5fca0d19/79088a4d/291c40b1/3808134287/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d28/5fca0d19/79088a4d/291c40b0/3808134287/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend: Things felt different tonight, as I thought they might. This was my second debate, and I walked on that stage with an even stronger sense of purpose than I did in October. **I wouldn’t have made it here without you, and I hope you know how grateful I am for your support.** I walked off stage tonight energized and grateful for the chance to talk with you all again. Although there’s a long road of hard work ahead of us, I’m truly inspired for what we’re going to achieve together — we _are_ going to stabilize the climate crisis, we _can_ fix everything that Donald Trump has broken, and we _will_ put people over corporations to create a democracy that actually works. I’m completely invested in this work — [_**if you’re with me for the next phase of this campaign, chip in $1 and help me qualify for next month’s debate.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBp8P9ONZnN8l-2Ffw22HZRSC1mFfjCO0JskafmRGtoRfu5qkAfUxCj-2Bp8B4WpJFvHLlOfhJHzZYuZU6QAUWBbtKq7mPENYn2FoF-2Bo07NaL-2FwbJVgal4kCo4pn0nKn6qdhfvwkWff-2FJSVk6Bm7biCnKCYkMOS2RiFWw1bHMzFcRp9cyWny3StTToxeH82OCoo8la3ZXxB6GPn-2FFbtV3G00K4sX25w3Y93ToVwWTjzUUWFCs_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFd6cOH5fvWmrKGtuMN3DH6iXPNojKvKOXGDBV3e9hj0FfNwVurWhTHKQyehFTbUJjL2lmTE4orx9VtykWhyP2Os7XMH6JYnziR2W4tyZRgurWB2YlBstfvjL0e4OMNV0lPqVRiFXJeJeNh6U06zmQm2i3GvLjjM7GF7kQvSQWAp2SA2LqjBN78FHL2BWx-2FVOHpkqvL6h32U0XSTtTaZ-2Bmyqf42bFQEmTfVakQYnFY0whvyyNeUTSve0ABBMTRhN74Oa3um-2BD9VPC0iEcEeuFsJuqao3QCQuhb5cmw3JeHEJ-2FcEqBQcoVKyJguXs3z2m4uDW0GuhhDEfUWQXRxE2oKUo7SS0bq-2Fwzr74QmEph5H7Qw-3D-3D) Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for everything you do to support this work. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team_Juli=C3=A1n?=
subject: Julián won the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | He wasn't on the stage tonight, but Julian's ideas and voice were present throughout the entire debate. **For the first time, they talked about many issues he 's been championing, like housing. ** [](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191120_em_fr_b5_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b5_castro_all")Supporters across the country tuned in online to hear Julian's take on the discussion tonight - and we were so strong we kept #JulianDebates trending all night long. During the entire debate, we heard the same sentiment echoed over and over again: we need Julian on this stage. **So let 's get him back on that stage. ** [We need to keep his voice in this race and get him back on the debate stage in December. We're only 10,000 donors away from meeting the December donor threshold. Chip in $5 now to help us get there.>>](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191120_em_fr_b5_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+keep+his+voice+in+this+race+a&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b5_castro_all") It's meant so much to Julian and our entire team to have you on our side. We're just getting started. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c5/3eb3e2fc/573e62ae/744d739d/3648666668/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b5_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8c5/3eb3e2fc/573e62ae/744d739c/3648666668/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191120_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191120_em_fr_b5_castro_all"). name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Tonight and always
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I am grateful, but I am also determined. I am determined to fight for big, structural change -- on issues from climate change to health care to corruption -- because the time for small ideas is over.. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b81/45c30650/11b21abf6/66f760fc/1864596724/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Tonight and every day, I'm in this fight because I am grateful.

My daddy ended up as a janitor and I had a chance to become a public school teacher, a college professor, a senator, and now, a candidate for president of the United States.

**I am grateful, but I am also determined.** I am determined to fight for big, structural change -- on issues from climate change to health care to corruption -- because the time for small ideas is over.

**And what comes next after tonight's debate will depend on you. Shoulder to shoulder, we can build a movement for change -- but we've got to get organizing now.**

**[We don't have much time left before the first ballots are cast. So I'm asking you: Are you able to help fuel this movement with a contribution tonight?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528b81/45c30650/11b21abf6/66f760ff/1864596724/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDkyRl9ERUJfQklPX0VfMjAxOTExMjBfVjNTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML92F_DEB_BIO_E_20191120_V3S3_P")**

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I just got off the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We proved tonight that our campaign is the one to watch.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3369%2E377263%2EQFPcDx) Yang Gang --

I just got off the debate stage, and we proved tonight that our campaign is the one to watch.

In the past few months, we’ve seen career politicians drop out or fail to make the debates, but you have kept us in the race and growing in the polls, Yang Gang.

We’ve made it this far, but we still have critical milestones ahead, like making it to the December debate and then winning in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. So we can’t slow down now -- not even a little bit.

**All eyes are on us, and the next 24 hours are crucial to keeping our campaign on track. [Can you donate $10 or more before midnight?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17438?t=5&akid=3369%2E377263%2EQFPcDx)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17438?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3369%2E377263%2EQFPcDx)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17438?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3369%2E377263%2EQFPcDx)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17438?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3369%2E377263%2EQFPcDx)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17438?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3369%2E377263%2EQFPcDx)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17438?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3369%2E377263%2EQFPcDx)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17438?t=8&amount=25&akid=3369%2E377263%2EQFPcDx)
---
At first, everyone thought the Freedom Dividend was crazy. They thought an outsider like me couldn’t beat sitting senators and governors.

But here we are, just one poll away from qualifying from the December debate.

We’ve proved ourselves before. Now, it’s time to do it again.

**[Donate $10 before midnight to take our fight all the way to Washington, D.C.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17438?t=7&akid=3369%2E377263%2EQFPcDx)**

Thanks for watching tonight, and thanks for everything you do, Yang Gang.

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17438?t=6&akid=3369%2E377263%2EQFPcDx)

name: Team Crenshaw
subject: REMINDER: Survey response needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crenshaw for Congress PO Box 1003, Alexandria, VA 22313
body:
Don't want to receive anymore emails? [Unsubscribe here](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6639333/136068195/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MTM2MDY4MTk1LjE1NzQ5NmUzYWI1NjZlNTRkZjhhOGE5ZGEyMmI2NDkyJm49VCZsPWEtZ3Mmbz02NjM5MzMz&x=eecac114). Friend, A few days ago, Congressman Crenshaw reached out to you personally, asking for your participation in his Congressional One Year Survey. Now that he has been in Congress for just over one year, he wants to check in with conservatives like you to make sure that he's doing everything he can to defend our freedom and represent your voice. We will be finalizing the results of the survey to share with him later today, so we wanted to give you one final chance to participate. Congressman Crenshaw will be reviewing each response individually, **[so make sure you submit your feedback as soon as possible, we don't have much time before it will hit his desk.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/6639333/136068195/116359/2/)** **OFFICIAL SURVEY**

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Don't let them silence me
body:
[ ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543121:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r) Peter, The "war on women" is real, but this time it's coming from Democrats - who have trained ALL their ammo on me. Why? For attempting to speak during the impeachment hearings about Rep Schiff's partisan "hearing".

Now, in just the last few days:
* ABC News' Matthew Dowd tweeted that I was only elected because I was a woman and a millennial - like that was a bad thing. Of course, he'd praise me if I was a left-wing Democrat.

* I was called "lying trash" by George Conway, who then urged Democrats to give to my opponent.

* Those left-wing donors answered - and generated $600k for my opponent in just 3 days.

I have to be honest. That money will overwhelm my campaign if it can't be matched immediately. [**Can I count on you?**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543121:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r)

I will need at least 1,000 donors to do it. That's why I need your support right now. [ **Donate $15 Raise $30 Right Now >>** ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543122:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r) [ **Donate $30 Raise $60 Right Now >>** ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543123:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r) [ **Donate $50 Raise $100 Right Now >>** ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543124:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r) For the last three years the Democrats have called every Republican a sexist. They've said we hate women.

Well I'm a woman, and a proud conservative. In fact, I was the youngest woman ever elected to Congress when I won my first race.

**Last week, I exposed Adam Schiff using his own words. But the "Impeacher in Chief" silenced me.**

He silenced me because he's afraid of me. He doesn't want America to see a young conservative woman standing with the President.

Well, he couldn't get rid of me. And I won't back down. EVER.

That's why the Democrats are attacking me now with all they've got.

Fortunately, a group of conservative leaders are standing with me and they've agreed to match every dollar I raise online for the next 24 hours.

That's why I need your support right now. [ **Donate $15 Raise $30 Right Now >>** ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543122:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r) [ **Donate $30 Raise $60 Right Now >>** ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543123:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r) [ **Donate $50 Raise $100 Right Now >>** ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543124:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r) They tried hard to defeat me last year, with my opponent raising $1.5 million for the effort. And now they're desperate to make an example of me.

They're doing all they can turn that $1.5 million dollars into $3 million dollars, or more... this weekend, my 2020 Democrat opponent raised more than $600,000, with radical Democrats across America pouring in donations because I stood against Schiff and these phony impeachment hearings.

That money will now flow into my district to buy TV ads, radio ads, digital ads, and fund every dishonest attack and dirty trick in the Democrat arsenal.

**After last week, I'm their number one target. **

But I'm not afraid of them, because I know I have two things they don't have - the truth, and the support of proud conservatives like you.

**Peter, I'm going to keep fighting Schiff, I'm never going to back down.** [**Will you support my efforts by donating $15, $35, or even $50 today?**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543121:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r) Remember, your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar!

My entire life I've been a proud conservative. That means, on top of believing in God & country, I also believe in facts and reason. I know the Democrats don't.
That's why they're trying to impeach the President. And its why Adam Schiff attacked me, and why he's trying to silence my voice.

This is why I must (and will) keep fighting this impeachment insanity. But I can't do it alone.

We can't waste this opportunity. For the next 24 hours, every dollar we raise online will be doubled. Please, help me keep fighting by donating anything. [**Even as little as $15 will be a huge help.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543122:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r)

Thank you so much for your support.

Together, we can Make America Even Greater.

Elise Stefanik (R-NY) [ ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543121:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r)
---
This email was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

This email was sent by: Scott Walker Inc., Post Office Box 620437, Middleton, WI 53562

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Elise for Congress. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Scott Walker's online community.

[Click here](https://email.granitelists.com/form/103832/9246/preferences/3?enc=W4Sng8vcN&eemail=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mhash=440e67abdfef13c09449e09a740d524e) if you would prefer to not receive future emails from Elise for Congress.

[Click here](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53543125:W4Sng8vcN:m:1:1155937413:96DB7C900936391167602ED0E4A1B5E7:r) to unsubscribe.

name: Christina Finello
subject: PA-01 is going to flip in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Peter,

As a licensed clinical psychologist, I need to get recertified every year, and my deadline to complete my 30 hours for recertification is at the end of this month.

I’ll be blunt with you: with my recertification courses and Thanksgiving coming up, I’m worried we’re going to miss our November fundraising benchmark, and after I emailed yesterday, only a handful of folks pitched in.

The election results from the past couple years and events the past couple weeks show that Bucks and Montgomery Counties are trending Democrat, and if we can continue to build on the blue wave here, I know we can win PA-01. My opponent, Brian Fitzpatrick, is incredibly vulnerable \-- in fact, he’s on the GOP’s top 10 list of seats they MUST win if they’re going to take back the House.

If we win here, we can guarantee that the House stays under Democratic control and we can elect a leader like me who will be more than just a red rubber seal of approval on Donald Trump’s and Mitch McConnell’s destructive agenda.

Families in our district deserve better, but unless we can get more folks like you to chip in before tomorrow at midnight to help us hit our November numbers, winning this race is going to be a steep uphill battle.

We’re $2,360 short, so I’m asking you personally: Will you donate at the link now?

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12081234/123848787/2063951955?refcode=CFN20191121&refcode2=Bgk5chmIfohc4iGxeat2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTIxNjhjOS03MzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRqbDNR6m7qejM1sSLAUhx7E12eziWwvegppaDx9gsA=)

Appreciate your support,
Christina

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: If Democrats really are the ‘party of the people," our policies should help all people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
**America spends less than any developed nation on labor force training — .001% of our GDP!**
It is why 12 million Americans stopped looking for a job — they don’t have the skills for those available.
**I wrote about my unique "Training for a Lifetime" program for the Nashua Telegraph (link below) for the 65% of Americans who don’t have a college degree — and we have forgotten:**
"We have a serious skills gap in this country. Too many employers say they can’t find the skilled workers to fill available jobs. And yet** 5% of Americans have left the workforce over the past twenty years because they lack the skills to get a job** in this labor market – and they don’t have the money to afford training. My party has focused a great deal of attention on college debt. Of course the inflation in tuition costs and the burden of debt faced by some merits a concerted response. But **forgiving all student debt, as many Democratic candidates are proposing, forces the 65% of Americans who do not have a degree to fund the education of those who do.** "
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12081261/123849168/1036341175?refcode=em112119training&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTIxNjhjOS03MzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zKPEnwiLrfq4vbQpKDON8Y2Fw59WjqBuoIjpFBupM3A=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12081262/123849169/723115086?refcode=em112119training&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTIxNjhjOS03MzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zKPEnwiLrfq4vbQpKDON8Y2Fw59WjqBuoIjpFBupM3A=)
_Visit to New Hampshire’s Granite State Trade School_
My “Training for a Lifetime” program provides an answer to the question many have asked: **what happens to that coal miner when the mine closes as we move to green technologies and away from fossil fuels? **What happens to the farm laborer when driverless tractors put him or her out of a job? At the moment, 40% of all Americans cannot find $400 to deal with an emergency – how do we expect them to be able to afford to pay for job training after they’ve lost their job?
As President,** I will lead our country to make a national commitment to what I call “Training for a Lifetime.” **In the military, we constantly train and re-train servicemembers — this explains why the U.S. Air Force runs the largest community college system in the country — because technology changes so rapidly. But **while technology might become obsolete, a hard worker never will.**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12081263/123849170/1036341175?refcode=em112119training&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTIxNjhjOS03MzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zKPEnwiLrfq4vbQpKDON8Y2Fw59WjqBuoIjpFBupM3A=)
**If we don’t make workforce training for a lifetime a national priority, our country will not be able to compete with global rivals.** But it’s not just an investment in our economic future – it’s also a **renewal of our national promise to take care of all of our citizens, and not just those who already enjoy the privilege of a college degree. **We owe it to the Americans who work with their hands and their minds to do better and help them find the opportunities they need to thrive.
[**If you believe we need a President who looks after all Americans, and not just college graduates, please contribute to help get my message out.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12081264/123849171/723115086?refcode=em112119training&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTIxNjhjOS03MzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zKPEnwiLrfq4vbQpKDON8Y2Fw59WjqBuoIjpFBupM3A=)
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12081265/123849172/1036341175?refcode=em112119training&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTIxNjhjOS03MzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zKPEnwiLrfq4vbQpKDON8Y2Fw59WjqBuoIjpFBupM3A=)
Warmest regards, Joe

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: (WITH CORRECTED LINK) If Democrats really are the "party of the people," our policies should help all people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
**_Re-sent with link to full text of article_**
Peter,
**America spends less than any developed nation on labor force training — .001% of our GDP!**
It is why 12 million Americans stopped looking for a job — they don’t have the skills for those available.
**I wrote about my unique "Training for a Lifetime" program for the Nashua Telegraph (link below) for the 65% of Americans who don’t have a college degree — and we have forgotten:**
"We have a serious skills gap in this country. Too many employers say they can’t find the skilled workers to fill available jobs. And yet** 5% of Americans have left the workforce over the past twenty years because they lack the skills to get a job** in this labor market – and they don’t have the money to afford training. My party has focused a great deal of attention on college debt. Of course the inflation in tuition costs and the burden of debt faced by some merits a concerted response. But **forgiving all student debt, as many Democratic candidates are proposing, forces the 65% of Americans who do not have a degree to fund the education of those who do.** "
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12084566/123873785/1036341175?refcode=em112119training&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTY2M2U0YS03YzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oj2ZOhVfNJNLbaZ3undUOj9Mb-0aVZLQTYUeN5E1XJ4=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12084567/123873786/723115086?refcode=em112119training&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTY2M2U0YS03YzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oj2ZOhVfNJNLbaZ3undUOj9Mb-0aVZLQTYUeN5E1XJ4=)
_Visit to New Hampshire’s Granite State Trade School_
My “Training for a Lifetime” program provides an answer to the question many have asked: **what happens to that coal miner when the mine closes as we move to green technologies and away from fossil fuels? **What happens to the farm laborer when driverless tractors put him or her out of a job? At the moment, 40% of all Americans cannot find $400 to deal with an emergency – how do we expect them to be able to afford to pay for job training after they’ve lost their job?
As President,** I will lead our country to make a national commitment to what I call “Training for a Lifetime.” **In the military, we constantly train and re-train servicemembers — this explains why the U.S. Air Force runs the largest community college system in the country — because technology changes so rapidly. But **while technology might become obsolete, a hard worker never will.**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12084568/123873787/1036341175?refcode=em112119training&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTY2M2U0YS03YzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oj2ZOhVfNJNLbaZ3undUOj9Mb-0aVZLQTYUeN5E1XJ4=)
**If we don’t make workforce training for a lifetime a national priority, our country will not be able to compete with global rivals.** But it’s not just an investment in our economic future – it’s also a **renewal of our national promise to take care of all of our citizens, and not just those who already enjoy the privilege of a college degree. **We owe it to the Americans who work with their hands and their minds to do better and help them find the opportunities they need to thrive.
[**If you believe we need a President who looks after all Americans, and not just college graduates, please contribute to help get my message out.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12084569/123873788/723115086?refcode=em112119training&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTY2M2U0YS03YzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oj2ZOhVfNJNLbaZ3undUOj9Mb-0aVZLQTYUeN5E1XJ4=)
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12084570/123873789/1036341175?refcode=em112119training&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTY2M2U0YS03YzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oj2ZOhVfNJNLbaZ3undUOj9Mb-0aVZLQTYUeN5E1XJ4=)
Warmest regards, Joe
**LINK TO ARTICLE[HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12084571/123873790/-1423851184?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTY2M2U0YS03YzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oj2ZOhVfNJNLbaZ3undUOj9Mb-0aVZLQTYUeN5E1XJ4=&emci=ac4a594e-7b0c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=41663e4a-7c0c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)**
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12084572/123873791/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTY2M2U0YS03YzBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oj2ZOhVfNJNLbaZ3undUOj9Mb-0aVZLQTYUeN5E1XJ4=&emci=ac4a594e-7b0c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=41663e4a-7c0c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)

name: Major Sam Peters
subject: "I'd like to IMPEACH THE BASTARD right now."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Elect Sam Peters
body:
Those are the words of a United States Congresswoman. Let that sink in for a moment. President Trump has no chance with Dems in charge. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53548435:sQPGYkvNC:m:1:2105898951:5DA1A8ABFCC9BE798A22944C2E92651F:r)
---
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53548435:sQPGYkvNC:m:1:2105898951:5DA1A8ABFCC9BE798A22944C2E92651F:r)

N/A,

Those are the words of a United States Congresswoman.

Let that sink in for a moment.

**Are you kidding me?** Dina Titus used these choice words in front of thousands of first in the nation voters (Nevada is the 2nd state to hold a caucus - and the first in the west). She also seemed to be pandering to several leading Democrat candidates for President who were also in attendance.

_**Unbelievable!!**_

That Democrats would stoop to this level doesn't surprise me; that a member of Congress who has an iota of respect left for the office of the President would outlandishly, publicly stoop this low is just plain **trashy**.

N/A - **my name is Major Sam Peters** , and _this is a prime example of why I'm running for Congress_. I'm not running against Dina Titus, but **I AM** running in Nevada against her best friend in Congress - _who I have no doubt shares the same sentiments as Ms. Titus and has demonstrated similar trashiness_.

| [ **Send a patriot to Congress
Donate Today »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53548435:sQPGYkvNC:m:1:2105898951:5DA1A8ABFCC9BE798A22944C2E92651F:r)
---

As a Nevadan and an American patriot, this type of attitude and blatant disrespect toward our Commander-in-Chief shakes me to my core, and quite frankly, disgusts me.

Stand with me, N/A. **[Join my team and help me rid Washington of this Democrat filth](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53548435:sQPGYkvNC:m:1:2105898951:5DA1A8ABFCC9BE798A22944C2E92651F:r)**. They are clearly trying to rally their troops. To keep President Trump in the White House and stop this utter nonsense in Congress, **we MUST** rally too.

[ **Send a Patriot to Congress
Donate Today »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53548435:sQPGYkvNC:m:1:2105898951:5DA1A8ABFCC9BE798A22944C2E92651F:r)
---

N/A - the slander didn't stop there.

Regaling the audience with recent Democratic victories at the state level, the Congresswoman continued:

"_**we took the Kentucky governorship and the Louisiana governorship, but my favorite one was the lady who flipped off the President and then got elected**_."

This is how THEY ALL FEEL, N/A.

We can _**NOT**_ let them win.

**[Chip-in $25 today->
Chip-in $50 today->
Chip-in $100 today->
Chip-in $500 today->

I appreciate your participation today.

Major Sam Peters, USAF (Ret.)

| | | | | | | Peter,

Another day of testimony in this impeachment hoax, same story.

The Schiff show trial is a TOTAL SHAM... the deranged Democrats have _no evidence_ , _no credible witnesses_ , and _no due process for President Trump_!

He needs strong, unwavering allies. **[Stand with me in this fight](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=cdcd6f1130d64fdba25cf699f515716707bf92700dff564a8c7cdce5415e57fe6ad4f3627f02ff6312e38052e42d5d58e2d8567478ddde6b "Stand with me in this fight")**.

This impeachment witch hunt is all about undoing the 2016 election. It's about silencing President Trump and silencing YOU. They hate our conservative and Christian values.

**Help me bring sanity back to Washington.** I'm the only candidate in this race tough enough to stand alongside President Trump and defeat liberal Democrat Doug Jones. I'm ready for the fight.

**[Donate $5, $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to fight for Alabama and America!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=cdcd6f1130d64fdb951234589d7dcfb0973721b6a8b7de2a0ca2a91198999d8f98d9308391e4ffc2bf3d15db62685f88e9ef53ef840098db "Donate $5, $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to fight for Alabama and America!")**

| | | Coach,

The desperate and dishonest Democrats' public impeachment spectacle is underway... and it's clear that NOTHING has changed.

**They have NO credible witnesses and NO hard evidence!**

It's more apparent than ever what this is all about: They want to destroy President Trump at any cost - and they're willing to shred the hard facts, due process, and the Constitution that are standing in their way.

Coach isn't mincing words. This fight over impeachment boils down to good vs. evil.

If you agree, **[rush YOUR support today to stand with Coach and President Trump!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=4d463713e61f47734b2dcc5251ec1d7a2a5200252418e5e5d55d168eb44a0a4f567f01a3cecd945b85a2ef758468a3b61fc5adfb48f6d80c "rush YOUR support today to stand with Coach and President Trump!")**

The Democrats are driven by HATRED, and they will say and do anything to tear down President Trump. Why? Because he's an outsider who won't play their games and is keeping an eye on them.

_They 're no longer able to steal all the money from taxpayers like they have in the past!_

President Trump needs as much support as possible right now, and Coach is the ONLY candidate in this race tough enough to stand alongside him.

**[Donate $5, $10, $25, or $50, or more if you can, to show President Trump that Alabama has his back!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=4d463713e61f477324bf13eebf5f14c89912be92da68adea2899c90432f6c40f4a3ce752d7e0185f0211b046acf0f51e597fcf2721dd28bf "Donate $5, $10, $20, or $50, or more if you can, to show President Trump that Alabama has his back!")**

clean_body: I'm the ONLY candidate tough enough to stand with President Trump. Help us keep up the fight & WIN! >> | | | | | | | Peter, Another day of testimony in this impeachment hoax, same story. The Schiff show trial is a TOTAL SHAM... the deranged Democrats have no evidence , no credible witnesses , and no due process for President Trump! He needs strong, unwavering allies. "Stand with me in this fight". This impeachment witch hunt is all about undoing the 2016 election. It's about silencing President Trump and silencing YOU. They hate our conservative and Christian values. Help me bring sanity back to Washington. I'm the only candidate in this race tough enough to stand alongside President Trump and defeat liberal Democrat Doug Jones. I'm ready for the fight. "Donate $5, $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to fight for Alabama and America!" \- Coach From: Team Tuberville To: Coach Tuberville Date: Wednesday, November 20, 2019 Subject: Good vs. evil | | | | Coach, The desperate and dishonest Democrats' public impeachment spectacle is underway... and it's clear that NOTHING has changed. They have NO credible witnesses and NO hard evidence! It's more apparent than ever what this is all about: They want to destroy President Trump at any cost - and they're willing to shred the hard facts, due process, and the Constitution that are standing in their way. Coach isn't mincing words. This fight over impeachment boils down to good vs. evil. If you agree, "rush YOUR support today to stand with Coach and President Trump!" The Democrats are driven by HATRED, and they will say and do anything to tear down President Trump. Why? Because he's an outsider who won't play their games and is keeping an eye on them. They 're no longer able to steal all the money from taxpayers like they have in the past! President Trump needs as much support as possible right now, and Coach is the ONLY candidate in this race tough enough to stand alongside him. "Donate $5, $10, $20, or $50, or more if you can, to show President Trump that Alabama has his back!" \- Team Tuberville id:2019-11-15-20:57:12:003t id:2019-11-15-20:53:23:240t Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc. | | | This email was sent by: Tuberville for Senate 210 Virginia Avenue, Auburn, AL, 36830 United States

name: Peters, Gary
subject: Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell don't scare me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa69/5721a3ed/71e4f70c/efa93c5/601117024/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,

I've been through many tough elections in my life - but this time around, the stakes are higher than ever. **Our race in Michigan will decide Senate control, and Republicans are doubling down to defeat me. **

Last fundraising quarter, my right-wing opponent outraised us, thanks to Donald Trump and the Senate GOP helping funnel millions into Michigan to buy this seat and expand Mitch McConnell's grip on the Senate.
But you know what?** Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell don't scare me. **I was born and raised in Michigan. I've been fighting for the people of my state for decades, and I won't back down for a second.
In fact, I'll fight harder than ever - but with polls showing this race tied, and Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reporting the Senate is up for grabs, I need your help if we're going to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats.

With our fundraising deadline just hours away, we're falling dangerously short of our goal - that's why a generous group of donors will be matching all gifts dollar for dollar - but only until midnight tonight.

**In a race this close, hitting or missing this goal could determine Senate control, so - with just hours left until midnight - I'm counting on your immediate contribution:**

[Please, will you rush $3 or more right now - before tonight's midnight deadline - and have every dollar doubled to defend Michigan's Senate seat, take back the Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa69/5721a3ed/71e4f70c/efa93c4/601117024/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNDUtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk145-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: I fight back. I derail their plans.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Andrew Cuomo, Bill de Blasio, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez don’t want me in Congress. They don’t want me in office. Period.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=41A46A1A491)
---
| | |
---
| | **Friends-
**
Andrew Cuomo, Bill de Blasio, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez don’t want me in Congress. They don’t want me in office. Period.

Here's Why:

* I wrote to the U.S. Justice Department to STOP Bill de Blasio’s heroin injection centers.

* I exposed Cuomo giving free college tuition to illegal immigrants before Gold Star families on national TV and got the program extended to the children of our military.

* I pushed back on de Blasio’s plan to reduce the standards of our specialized schools and eliminate Gifted & Talented programs. Now he’s taken his proposals off the table.

* I’m exposing the dangerous new bail law and the truth about socialism.

I fight back. I derail their plans.

That’s why they’ll do everything they can to try to stop me from going to Washington where I’ll have an even better platform to fight back. They are going to raise and spend millions in special interest money against me.

That’s why I’m counting on supporters like you.

[Chip in $10, $25 or any amount to help me keep fighting back.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=41A46A1A454)

name: Kate Day
body:
Dear Derek, **Thirty-four seats were decided in the NH House by less than 100 votes.** Did you see Leader Hinch’s email yesterday? I'm joining Leader Hinch and Republicans across the state in stepping up to become a [NHGOP Grassroots Giver.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjk0MTY5ODI2OTM1MTgyOTMxJmM9ZDFxOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yOTQ4MTI3MjgmZD1mMmQ3ejVl.bBRfpc_ifqHCgRgXICQNjEzyBfpSfdn12gLZ9J1DY6M) I'm becoming a Grassroots Giver because I know that [**every contribution**](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjk0MTY5ODI2OTM1MTgyOTMxJmM9ZDFxOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yOTQ4MTI3MzAmZD15MmcyZjVv.wxb71eO0XhIc8a01sH5Uf1cfoY7_VFD7lPAPYxFzRR4) can help make a difference in a race for the State House. I joined Leader Hinch in stepping up because New Hampshire is reaching a tipping point. We cannot afford to leave Governor Sununu as the only defense of the New Hampshire Advantage. The 2020 Elections are less than a year away, and after seeing what this legislature has passed, we can't afford to lose. [We need 19 more people to make a commitment of $10 a month to give the NHGOP the tools to compete in these close districts and win.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjk0MTY5ODI2OTM1MTgyOTMxJmM9ZDFxOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yOTQ4MTI3MzImZD1rNWsyaTZ4.-uvAy8FeSpKGdrPRCwjJcawYxqq7Exu2P6jetXIm9Ww) On to Victory, Kate Day
* * *
###### ****
###### **New Hampshire Republican State Committee** | 10 Water Street, Concord
This email was sent to [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjk0MTY5ODI2OTM1MTgyOTMxJmM9ZDFxOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yOTQ4MTMwMDImZD1mMnIzYjFk.c7mSy0MyGrHujbCYTsuHqwWHJP_u9tDc1cRc9a_YYZw) | [Forward this email to a friend](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjk0MTY5ODI2OTM1MTgyOTMxJmM9ZDFxOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yOTQ4MTI3MzQmZD1uOWYyeDJy.928lTjgkgpmK8fimJt7GsffAQx1AJllmixjcaIXoZTs)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Sondland is taking everyone down with him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Let's get right to it. Gordon Sondland, Trump mega-donor and current E.U. ambassador, testified publicly yesterday that Trump tried to strong-arm Ukraine into announcing an investigation of his political opponents \-- and illegally withheld their foreign aid as leverage. But he didn't just reveal he was following orders from the president to pressure Ukraine \-- he also fully implicated V.P. Mike Pence and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo in the scheme. He's opened the doors wide open to further investigations into the conduct of the entire senior administration of the U.S. and exposed the rot that is festering in our highest office. This is an extraordinarily sad day for our country. It showed just how far those elected to serve will go toward destroying this country's reputation to push their own personal interests. This administration has eviscerated the dedicated civil service in the executive branch, gutted the foreign service, and left our international standing in shambles. But we have the chance to do something incredible in 2020. We can take back the White House and the Senate. We can show the courageous witnesses like Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman and former ambassador Marie Yovanovitch that they were right to stand up for the truth and for the America we believe in. We can vote this administration out next year, but only if we dig in right now. The 2020 primaries are just around the corner. Before we know it, it will be Election Day 2020. We HAVE to organize and mobilize now to build out our resources and ensure we keep the House, retake the Senate, and win back the White House. [**It 's because of people like you that we can reach hundreds of thousands of voters and motivate them to the ballot box, but we can't stop there. We need to build on this momentum, and we need your support immediately in order to do that. Anything you can give, even just $1, will go a long way toward beating Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all their corrupt enablers. Can you donate today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc5/6e9863e8/168f1ee3/1db0ae48/285328064/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191121b.ND&refcode2=MgVEXTA0euVPXHlSXAwb") Thank you for standing with us in this fight. We couldn't do it without the amazing support of people like you. The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc5/6e9863e8/168f1ee3/1db0ae4e/285328064/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191121b.ND&refcode2=MgVEXTA0euVPXHlSXAwb")

name: Cory Booker
subject: Why I decided to scrap the closing statement I'd prepared last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, I spent a lot of time preparing my closing statement for last night's debate. But I decided to scrap it. That's because I looked out in the audience and saw John Lewis, a man without whom I wouldn't be who or where I am today. Fifty years ago, a lawyer sat on his couch watching a TV movie that was interrupted by breaking news from the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama. That lawyer saw John Lewis and other marchers beaten viciously by Alabama State Troopers because they dared to stand up for their rights -- and that lawyer was inspired to do what he could to help. He chose to represent families, one of them mine, who were being discriminated against while they searched for a home. The house I grew up in was ours thanks to that lawyer's efforts. **And when I spoke to John Lewis after the debate, I was reminded that we all owe debts that we cannot repay. We all drink deeply from wells of freedom and liberty that we did not dig.** **[This is a moral moment in America, and we need a president who can inspire us to get up and fight again.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191121_CB_20191121-fr-CB-pd1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** If I'm given the chance to be the next president of the United States, I will challenge you to rise to this moment, and I will ask more of you than any president ever has. And I will cause a whole lot of something John Lewis calls "good trouble." Because this isn't just about defeating the current occupant of the White House -- that's the floor. We need to reach for the ceiling. This entire campaign, I've been calling for us to fight -- and to fight the right way, by bringing people together to make transformative change for our country. I know that what I chose to say in that moment might end up being my last statement in one of these debates. **The truth is I have not yet qualified for the December debate, and our underdog campaign needs a powerful push to get us there.** **I 'm asking you to keep me on that stage. [Chip in right now if you can, because I'm just getting started.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191121_CB_20191121-fr-CB-pd1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It means so much -- thank you,
Cory _P.S. My team tells me that more people donated to our campaign for the first time last night than did on the day we launched. clean_body: | | | | Friend, I spent a lot of time preparing my closing statement for last night's debate. But I decided to scrap it. That's because I looked out in the audience and saw John Lewis, a man without whom I wouldn't be who or where I am today. Fifty years ago, a lawyer sat on his couch watching a TV movie that was interrupted by breaking news from the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama. That lawyer saw John Lewis and other marchers beaten viciously by Alabama State Troopers because they dared to stand up for their rights -- and that lawyer was inspired to do what he could to help. He chose to represent families, one of them mine, who were being discriminated against while they searched for a home. The house I grew up in was ours thanks to that lawyer's efforts. And when I spoke to John Lewis after the debate, I was reminded that we all owe debts that we cannot repay. We all drink deeply from wells of freedom and liberty that we did not dig. "=" If I'm given the chance to be the next president of the United States, I will challenge you to rise to this moment, and I will ask more of you than any president ever has. And I will cause a whole lot of something John Lewis calls "good trouble." Because this isn't just about defeating the current occupant of the White House -- that's the floor. We need to reach for the ceiling. This entire campaign, I've been calling for us to fight -- and to fight the right way, by bringing people together to make transformative change for our country. I know that what I chose to say in that moment might end up being my last statement in one of these debates. The truth is I have not yet qualified for the December debate, and our underdog campaign needs a powerful push to get us there. I 'm asking you to keep me on that stage. "=" It means so much -- thank you, Cory P.S. My team tells me that more people donated to our campaign for the first time last night than did on the day we launched. That 's exactly the momentum we need to propel us into the December debate. "=" "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved. name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Four ideologies that will destroy America if Christians don’t vote
body:
Peter,
Millions of people of faith voted for President Trump in 2016 not because he was a Sunday school teacher, but because they believed he wouldn’t force the real Sunday school teachers, pastors, and priests to submit to government control of their beliefs about the sanctity of life or the biblical model of marriage.
**But I have to wonder, are Christians so comfortable today that we will fail to recognize the dangerous ideologies that threaten religious freedom now and in 2020?**
Ideologies championed by many political candidates such as:
1. **“Separation of church and state”** \- the lie that silences prayer at school and keeps the Ten Commandments out of the statehouse.
2. **“Acceptance”** \- requiring Christians to deny the Bible and participate in gay weddings or have their businesses closed.
3. **"Women's' choice"** \- forcing Christians to pay for the killing of unborn life - a baby created in the image of God.
4. **“Equality”** \- calling males females and females males \- violating the belief that gender is not determined by man but assigned by God.

America is an exceptional nation, not because we are better than anyone else. We are, in fact, an exception to all human history in that we are endowed by our Creator with certain unalienable rights. Paramount is our right to live by our faith without fear of government persecution.
But if our elected leaders (including our members of Congress) fully push these extreme ideologies in their policies - it will destroy the one right - religious freedom - that birthed the freest nation the world has ever known.
Even if just one of these flawed ideologies is applied to a policy in the way secular leftist politicians intend, it will wreck religious freedom in America.
**The _only_ protection against this happening is for Christians to VOTE. **
It’s estimated 25 million Christians could stay home and fail to vote unless they are mobilized, equipped with voter guides, and reminded to go to the polls.
When you support the work of My Faith Votes, you make it possible to inspire millions of believers to take full advantage of their vote, because as we have seen around the world, religious freedom is not and will never be guaranteed.
**[By the end of the year, we need to raise $283,000 to be on track to accomplish all we need to in 2020 to reach non-voting Christians. While that sounds like a big number, we know we can achieve it when all of My Faith Votes’ supporters pitch in and stand shoulder to shoulder](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191121apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191121apl01nda&n=1).**
Thank you for your time. I hope we can count on your continued support.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191121apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191121apl01nda&n=2)
It is your commitment and generosity that allows us to continue our mission, and I’m honored to have you on our side.
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191121apl01nda&n=3)
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191121apl01nda&n=4).

| | | | Peter,

As you may know, I have been an insulin-dependent diabetic for 30 years. **I am very familiar with how much the prices of life-sustaining medication have skyrocketed over the years.**

That is why I introduced legislation that will control the costs of life-saving medications like chemotherapy drugs, anti-seizure medications, and insulin.

I know that this bill will save people’s lives – that’s why I’m set on getting this legislation passed. But I need to know if my supporters stand with me. **[Sign on to stand with me in support of controlling the costs of life-saving prescription medications!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12091547/123934616/-1947902275?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGY1YjIyNy05NjBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmD15odxNkcTrI4NZGlBL_zDkvnKtM2o5eNsvP5GZEg=&emci=e341c12d-730c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=6df5b227-960c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)**

I’ve met with countless citizens who are devastated by the exorbitant costs of life-saving medications.

Bottom Line: **Drug companies should not be able to price-gouge hard-working people.**

**If you agree, then sign on to support this legislation to control the costs of life-saving prescription medications:**

**[https://secure.ngpvan.com/4Ez_HhwRYEmfpDXFpFEAsA2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12091550/123934619/-1947902275?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGY1YjIyNy05NjBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmD15odxNkcTrI4NZGlBL_zDkvnKtM2o5eNsvP5GZEg=&emci=e341c12d-730c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=6df5b227-960c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)**

Dan Lipinski

---
| Peter,
The endorsements keep rolling in. Today, I'm happy to announce that I've received the endorsement of the Value in Electing Women PAC (VIEW PAC). VIEW PAC has spent over 20 years helping to elect strong conservative women to Congress.
Today's announcement adds to our growing list support from organizations such as Maggie's List and Rep. Elise Stefanik's E-PAC. As my campaign continues our strong fundraising and grassroots work, endorsements like these add to our momentum as we push closer to victory, and show that conservative women who are ready to lead and serve are stepping up to support each other.
With our growing list of endorsements and strong support from the people of the 32nd Congressional District, we're ending 2019 in a position of strength as the campaign to beat!
---
| Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve
---
| |
---

Did you watch last night’s debate, friend? Tom said what no one else on that stage was willing to say about the climate crisis: **If it’s not number one, it’s not going to get done.**
Climate is not a side issue for Tom — it’s _the_ issue. The fact is, if our planet becomes inhospitable, all the other meaningful progressive changes we’re striving for will not matter. **We can do this. We can take on the biggest challenge in history, save the world, and do it together.** That’s what Tom said at the debate last night, and it’s what he has been saying for years. Hi Peter

As we are watching the sad tin-foil-hat spectacle of the impeachment hearings this week, or what I call the "Schiff Show", it is worth remembering:

Five Democrats on that committee voted for impeachment before there ever was a Ukraine phone call!

Never forget what they said before they even got to Congress:

"We're gonna impeach the motherf**ker!" Rashida Tlaib, D-MI

"I am not running for anything except the impeachment of Trump!" Maxine Waters, D-CA

"Trump richly deserves impeachment" Jerry Nadler, D-NY

Elections are the right way to settle political differences. Not impeachment!

This week has shown that the Democrats have nothing! They have a few disgruntled Deep State bureaucrats who opine, but haven't actually witnessed anything.

I'm not like liberal Darren Soto or Adam Schiff. I’m not a career politician.

I'm a working class guy who loves God and my country. I'm 100% behind the President- and against impeachment!

We need to oust extreme Democrats like Darren Soto, who is way to the left of Florida, and send pro-Constitution representatives to Congress!

Most importantly, we need to make the crazy Democrats pay dearly for what they are doing to our Constitution and to the country.

I need your help today!

I need your help today- to make the Democrats pay, and replace Darren Soto and stop impeachment! Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hr2yj1nGcV6OuRU&b=aolWwYC7QYbMMkTpT1ZfYQ

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hr2yj1nGcV6OuRU&b=aolWwYC7QYbMMkTpT1ZfYQ
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

The Democrats are going to lose in 2020 with Trump at the top of the ticket- but only if we let the American people know about this sham. It's up to us!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hr2yj1nGcV6OuRU&b=aolWwYC7QYbMMkTpT1ZfYQ

Bill Olson

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hr2yj1nGcV6OuRU&b=aolWwYC7QYbMMkTpT1ZfYQ
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?
