name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Our seas are rapidly warming, threatening mass environmental collapse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, While all eyes are turned to the impeachment proceedings, we can't forget about all the lasting damage Trump is inflicting on our planet. Numerous areas across the globe are experiencing unprecedented warming events that threaten entire ecosystems, especially our seas and fisheries. And all the while, Trump is unraveling a slew of environmental regulations in favor of corporate profits, making the whole situation far, far worse. The future of our planet is on the ballot in 2020, so we need to hear what engaged voters think: **Are you worried about the environment with Trump in office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0f/6e9863e8/1688918a/1db0ae55/2280729693/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/gAgk3m-o") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0f/6e9863e8/1688918a/1db0ae55/2280729693/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/gAgk3m-o") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0f/6e9863e8/1688918a/1db0ae54/2280729693/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191121a.ND-b&refcode2=mIQo6ztz2YnWrRPjOSLL")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: State of the Race
body:
Priorities that Matter

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/7a4415ccfeda/state-of-the-race?e=41f8e27552)

>> STATE OF THE RACE UPDATE <<

Dear Friend,

I have been crisscrossing the state, meeting Kansans in small groups and even one on one. This race will be won by understanding intimately the challenges faced by fellow Kansans on Main Street and presenting realistic obtainable solutions to meet those challenges, not showboating for the media or stirring noise at the fringes.

My focus is getting the job done for Kansans, not getting a job to boost my ego!

Kansans want a proven leader to champion their issues – restoring patient choice and affordable market driven health care; ending the culture of debt fueling federal spending; protecting life and our most vulnerable citizens, and reforming immigration enforcement to not only secure our borders, but to also ensure the safety and security of our communities.

We’ve still got much work ahead of us. I need your help to achieve our priorities.

DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=cf8aa1a623-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_06_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-cf8aa1a623-180644441)

I am pleased to report to you that our endorsement list is growing, our fundraising is gaining steam, and our campaign organization is executing our focused priorities to build the foundations upon which to achieve victory on Election Day – and to get the job done for Kansas families. I need you on my team to keep our momentum going. Your support and contribution today makes a critical difference.

TOGETHER WE CAN GET THE JOB DONE FOR KANSANS.

DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=cf8aa1a623-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_06_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-cf8aa1a623-180644441)

Thank you for standing with me as we take a stand together
for our families and our nation!

Dave

P.S. Don’t forget to follow us online: www.lindstromforsenate.com (http://www.lindstromforsenate.com/?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=cf8aa1a623-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_06_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-cf8aa1a623-180644441)

and on social media @LindstromforKS

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: The Houston Housing Crisis
body:
Good morning Peter,
We want to invite you to join us this Friday at 6:00 PM for a viewing of a film discussing the Houston housing crisis. This film goes in depth about the zoning, redistricting, and housing issues that have developed in Houston over the last several years.

Our district is a clear example of the unjust redistricting that has taken place in Texas. This Friday, I hope to inform our supporters about the extent of this issue, and explain where change must be made to create a more equal and fairly represented district.

We will be providing pizza and drinks! Click here (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/161017/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=27b37728cf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_08_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-27b37728cf-32267927) to attend.
Sign Up to Attend (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/161017/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=27b37728cf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_08_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-27b37728cf-32267927)
https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/156239/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=27b37728cf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_08_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-27b37728cf-32267927
Be sure to donate to help us reach more voters! Your contributions will help us invest in new yard signs.
Donate today! (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=27b37728cf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_08_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-27b37728cf-32267927)
We hope to see you there!

Marc

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: 🚩BREAKING: Watkins votes against the NRA!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/31e5d3e2462a/for-immediate-release-kansas-state-treasurer-jake-laturner-announces-candidacy-for-us-congress-5578005?e=1050d051da)
---
| | | | Patriot,

We'll cut to the chase. We just learned that [**_Rep. Steve Watkins voted against the National Rifle Association on a key vote that would deny sportsmen their hunting rights. _**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=03eea5efb5&e=1050d051da)

To quote the NRA, when they asked Steve Watkins to vote against the floor amendment:

**“We respectfully urge a “NO” vote on the Buchanan/Huffman/Blumenauer/Lieu Amendment to H.R. 3055, Division C - Interior. Due to the importance of this issue, votes on this amendment will be considered in future candidate ratings and endorsements by the NRA Political Victory Fund.”**

Rep. Watkins was one of only four Republicans to vote against it. **That’s right - Steve sided with Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and the Squad** **_instead of sportsmen across the country. _**

But should this be a surprise?

In July of this year, Steve told a townhall he was [_open to supporting red flag laws_](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e661ea9aa2&e=1050d051da).

Last summer Steve said he was [_open to supporting the left’s top gun grabber agenda item of expanded background checks on law abiding citizens._](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e152176231&e=1050d051da)

The Second Amendment is a foundational cornerstone on which our country was built. It’s a fundamental right from which all our other rights flow. That’s why when I was in the State Senate, I carried constitutional carry on the Senate floor. I voted against the left’s gun control agenda and you can count on me to lead the fight for the Second Amendment in Congress.

---
| Honestly - this is an update I wish I didn’t have to send. But we are committed to getting the facts out to voters and to our supporters. We will continue to keep a close eye on the votes in Washington, and keep you posted so that you can make an informed choice about who you are voting for in 2020.

Yours in the fight,

Jake

---
| [DONATE to Stand up for the 2nd Amendment!]( "DONATE to Stand up for the 2nd Amendment!")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © *2019|* *Kansans for LaTurner*, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
*P.O. Box 67237, Topeka, KS 66667
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=e3c3e27c2f).

---

name: Preston, MJ Hegar Campaign Manager
subject: Strategy update: Phase 1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I want to give you some important information about our campaign strategy. This is a two-phase campaign and right now, we're in Phase 1 -- I've laid out what that means below.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909dd/7f51f7bc/4bf14d6c/4ef095a8/2787920515/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I want to give you some important information about our campaign strategy. This is a two-phase campaign and right now, we're in Phase 1 -- I've laid out what that means below.

Before you read more, I'm going to ask you to make a donation right now to help keep us going strong. **[Will you pitch in right now so we can complete Phase 1 of our campaign plan and take on Sen. Cornyn with the full force of this grassroots movement?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909dd/7f51f7bc/4bf14d6c/4ef095af/2787920515/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191121.1nd__538__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
* **_Raise the funds we need to compete with Sen. Cornyn's nearly $11 million war chest._** We're going to need a Texas-sized campaign to win this race, and we're building that foundation right now. **[Pitch in to help>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909dd/7f51f7bc/4bf14d6c/4ef095af/2787920515/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191121.1nd__538__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

* **_Meet with folks across the state to build a campaign platform that works for all Texans._** MJ wants to keep hearing from Texans who are struggling to pay for their prescriptions, suffering from floods and storms caused by climate change, and living in fear of gun violence, to make sure the solutions she's proposed will work for them.

* **_Prove that MJ is the candidate who can take down Sen. Cornyn._** Between returning fire on the Taliban while rescuing injured soldiers and taking on the Pentagon to allow women to compete for elite military jobs, she's a fighter through and through -- and we have to make sure she's the candidate who faces Sen. Cornyn next year.

**Winning this race will be a long, tough fight, but MJ has taken on tougher fights and won. We just have to get through every step of this campaign one by one -- and we need your help right now to execute Phase 1.**

**[Donate right now so we can power through Phase 1, defeat Sen. Cornyn, and send MJ to fight for us in the Senate>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909dd/7f51f7bc/4bf14d6c/4ef095af/2787920515/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191121.1nd__538__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

With your help, we'll start Phase 2 strong and have the resources we need to spread MJ's message far and wide, build a strong field organization, and WIN this race.

Thanks for reading through this update, and being part of Team MJ.

Preston Elliott
Campaign Manager

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909dd/7f51f7bc/4bf14d6c/4ef095af/2787920515/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzOCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191121.1nd__538__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---

|
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas

Round Rock, TX 78683

name: =?utf-8?Q?MUELLER_UPDATE_=28via_Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n=29?=
subject: Roger Stone's trial just revealed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign my emergency petition to CONDEMN Trump's lies and demand that the president tell the truth. >>
---
| | **BREAKING: Congress investigating Trump for false Mueller testimony** [10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign my emergency petition to CONDEMN Trump's lies and demand that the president tell the truth. >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b41d/18e32a7f/5035f91b/7b22f3ca/3287617080/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://peopleforben.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mueller-survey?source=20191121_em_pet_b1_muvbrl_all_v1") | I have serious concerns about Trump's testimony to Mueller.

Because Trump's top henchman, Roger Stone, was just found guilty of OBSTRUCTION and witness tampering in the Russia investigation.

_[**BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition to CONDEMN Trump 's lies and demand that he provides answers NOW. >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b41d/18e32a7f/5035f91b/7b22f3ca/3287617080/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://peopleforben.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mueller-survey?source=20191121_em_pet_b1_muvbrl_all_v1")_
** ** ****NAME** : dpwillis67@gmail.com****** ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b41d/18e32a7f/5035f91b/7b22f3ca/3287617080/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://peopleforben.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mueller-survey?source=20191121_em_pet_b1_muvbrl_all_v1")**
---

I'm furious.

Roger Stone -- Trump's top henchman -- was just found guilty, and faces DECADES in prison, for:

\- **OBSTRUCTING** the Russia investigation
\- **TAMPERING** with witnesses
\- **LYING** to Congress about all of it

**This is why I have serious concerns that Trump lied in his testimony to Robert Mueller, too. **

Never before have I seen a president and his henchmen go to such extreme lengths to hide the truth.

_[**I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition before midnight to CONDEMN Trump 's lies and DEMAND the truth. I'm calling you to action because this is a critical moment in our country's history. Will you sign before midnight? >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b41d/18e32a7f/5035f91b/7b22f3ca/3287617080/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://peopleforben.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mueller-survey?source=20191121_em_pet_b1_muvbrl_all_v1")_

This president's gross misuse of power is unacceptable. We all have a critical duty to hold him accountable and protect our democracy.

Thank you,

Ben Ray Lujan

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b41d/18e32a7f/5035f91b/7b22f3cb/3287617080/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b41d/18e32a7f/5035f91b/7b22f3c8/3287617080/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b41d/18e32a7f/5035f91b/7b22f3c9/3287617080/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b41d/18e32a7f/5035f91b/7b22f3ce/3287617080/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b41d/18e32a7f/5035f91b/7b22f3cf/3287617080/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b41d/18e32a7f/5035f91b/7b22f3cc/3287617080/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

Albuquerque, NM 87125

He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? ""** We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, "" If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: 2020 is coming up quickly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter - 2020 is coming up fast, and we're facing the most consequential election of our lifetime.

National Republicans and their shady big-money backers are already spending big in competitive House races across the country to take back the majority. But Peter: we won't let them win.

We're facing a critical fundraising deadline, so we must ensure that Democrats have the resources to go toe-to-toe with the GOP. [**Will you pitch in to help us raise $7,000 by midnight next Tuesday?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PDSSfiusCO4enolMkwtlf6Px_GiuYiymOBhY1YW5N2U=/hSpfv5a-1MVwtPukD6HCTuV8EB3n26bSpfkVzalvrGY=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191121&amount=25)

******[Donate $150 now](https://act.myngp.com/el/PDSSfiusCO4enolMkwtlf6Px_GiuYiymOBhY1YW5N2U=/hSpfv5a-1MVwtPukD6HCTuV8EB3n26bSpfkVzalvrGY=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191018_1_2&amount=150.00&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)******

******[Other amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/PDSSfiusCO4enolMkwtlf6Px_GiuYiymOBhY1YW5N2U=/hSpfv5a-1MVwtPukD6HCTuV8EB3n26bSpfkVzalvrGY=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191018_1_2&amount=10.00&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)****** With less than a year until the election, we can't afford to slow down.

Our progress on gun violence prevention, expanding affordable health care, and protecting our veterans is all on the line.

[**Pitch in right away to ensure Democrats can keep our House majority and continue this important work ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PDSSfiusCO4enolMkwtlf6Px_GiuYiymOBhY1YW5N2U=/hSpfv5a-1MVwtPukD6HCTuV8EB3n26bSpfkVzalvrGY=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191121&amount=25)

\-- Mike

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: When the Villain is Obama, Not Trump, News Suddenly Becomes Not Worth Reporting
body:
"So the United States has ‘the world’s highest rate of children in detention.’ Is this worth reporting? Maybe, maybe not. Nevertheless..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=616babe2ec&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **When the Villain is Obama, Not Trump, News Suddenly Becomes Not Worth Reporting**

“So the United States has ‘the world’s highest rate of children in detention.’ Is this worth reporting? Maybe, maybe not. Nevertheless, Agence France-Presse, or AFP, and Reuters did report it, attributing the information to a ‘United Nations study’ on migrant children detained at the US-Mexico border,” Kyle Smith writes for the _New York Post_.

“Then the two agencies retracted the story.” Why? “Sheepishly, the two news organizations explained that, you see, the UN data was from 2015.”

Why does that matter? “We all know who the president was in 2015,” Smith writes. Think about that: “The story was removed. Not updated or corrected, removed.”

How else does the media manipulate the news to their liking? Smith exposes all the tricks.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c8ce04191c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Gordon Sondland was supposed to be the key witness in the impeachment drive — the guy who’d nail the coffin shut on Donald Trump’s presidency.” Unfortunately for the impeachment-hungry far left, Sondland—like every other witness—only had speculation. Asked outright, “So you really have no testimony today that ties President Trump to a scheme to withhold aid from Ukraine in exchange for these investigations,” Sondland replied, “Other than my own presumption,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4f08bf9d5a&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Destruction-minded Democrats hope to deploy disagreements over every murmur and recollection of a phone call to evict President Trump from the White House. Reasonable people may disagree over meaning, but only the senseless would angle for impeachment,” [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b673ddedab&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump and Apple CEO Tim Cook toured a Texas manufacturing facility on Wednesday, getting a glimpse of a factory used by Apple to assemble the Mac Pro desktop. The tour was a public symbol of Trump’s close relationship with Cook, and also provided an opportunity for the president to showcase a leading American company that’s manufacturing in the U.S.,” Kif Leswing reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a97dc4f7a&e=3ee4985eea).

clean_body: "So the United States has ‘the world’s highest rate of children in detention.’ Is this worth reporting? Maybe, maybe not. Nevertheless..." | | | | | | | When the Villain is Obama, Not Trump, News Suddenly Becomes Not Worth Reporting “So the United States has ‘the world’s highest rate of children in detention.’ Is this worth reporting? Maybe, maybe not. Nevertheless, Agence France-Presse, or AFP, and Reuters did report it, attributing the information to a ‘United Nations study’ on migrant children detained at the US-Mexico border,” Kyle Smith writes for the New York Post. “Then the two agencies retracted the story.” Why? “Sheepishly, the two news organizations explained that, you see, the UN data was from 2015.” Why does that matter? “We all know who the president was in 2015,” Smith writes. Think about that: “The story was removed. Not updated or corrected, removed.” How else does the media manipulate the news to their liking? Smith exposes all the tricks. | | “Gordon Sondland was supposed to be the key witness in the impeachment drive — the guy who’d nail the coffin shut on Donald Trump’s presidency.” Unfortunately for the impeachment-hungry far left, Sondland—like every other witness—only had speculation. Asked outright, “So you really have no testimony today that ties President Trump to a scheme to withhold aid from Ukraine in exchange for these investigations,” Sondland replied, “Other than my own presumption,” the editorial board writes. | | “Destruction-minded Democrats hope to deploy disagreements over every murmur and recollection of a phone call to evict President Trump from the White House. Reasonable people may disagree over meaning, but only the senseless would angle for impeachment,” editorial board writes. | | “President Donald Trump and Apple CEO Tim Cook toured a Texas manufacturing facility on Wednesday, getting a glimpse of a factory used by Apple to assemble the Mac Pro desktop. The tour was a public symbol of Trump’s close relationship with Cook, and also provided an opportunity for the president to showcase a leading American company that’s manufacturing in the U.S.,” Kif Leswing reports for . | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: VA Watch (via Team Warner)
subject: Derek, if you think you know how 2020 will go, think again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Our Commonwealth is prone to wild political swings. We can't take our wins in 2018 and 2019 for granted or history could repeat itself.
|
---
| | Derek,

Here's the truth: **If you think you know how 2020 will go, think again.** Virginia politics are notoriously volatile. The old adage about the stock market applies to our elections: **past performance is not indicative of future results.**

Even though we enjoyed some big wins for Virginia Democrats this year and in the midterms last year, we can't be complacent and assume 2020 will be a repeat of 2019 and 2018.

**That's why we're reaching out to you. Will you make a donation to help Mark prepare for 2020? In our current political climate, you never know what will happen between now and Election Day.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through And only a year after President Obama won Virginia in 2008 by 6.3%, Republicans flipped the governor's mansion by a staggering margin of almost _**18%!**_

body:

| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
It's obvious that if the Democrats had their way all of the top conservatives would be silenced. They are for "impeaching now, investigating later" and that is NOT how we do things in America.

| Hi Peter,

As he comes under more scrutiny with DOJ’s criminal investigation into his shady campaign dealings, Ross Spano is apparently “clinging” to another embattled politician under investigation: **Donald Trump.**
|
According to _**The Tampa Bay Times** :_

“ __Spano has become a vociferous Trump defender_ and is comparing the investigation of his own 2018 campaign financing to the impeachment, which he calls a partisan sham._”
\-----

**Say NO to Spano and Trump.
_[Donate to replace Spano with veteran and Florida public servant Adam Hattersley!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12098069/124000763/-403487629?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.21_b1_TH_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQ4YjU1Zi1iNjBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lTKYAbCK6J-GAAjY7e6YtCH-pGBAFgIhGlBjYAtgBQ8=)_**

subject: Woah! You gotta read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, Jenna here. You know that I _love_ some good post-debate fundraising stats, and that's why I had to reach out today about the hours since the debate, otherwise known as our biggest online fundraising day of the entire campaign. Here are a few of my favorites:
* More people donated to our campaign for the first time after the debate last night **than did on the day we launched this campaign** \-- and by more people I mean almost _double._
* We raised more in the _first 22 minutes of the 11 p.m. hour_ than we did in the 12 hours following the third and fourth debates _COMBINED._
* We had our **best online fundraising _HOUR_ **of the campaign, where we raised more than our previous best online fundraising _DAY_ of the campaign.

But my favorite stat from last night? **We 've officially surpassed 200,000 individual donors -- one of the DNC December debate thresholds!** **Please help us keep this momentum going. Cory hasn 't qualified for the December debate yet because he needs 4% in four polls, and we need to capitalize on this moment to get him there.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191121_BHQ_20191121-fr-BHQ-numbers-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

It's critical that we make the December debate -- it's why we're launching ads in the early states to introduce more folks to Cory to get the polling numbers we need.
But all this requires a lot of resources, and a killer debate performance won't seal the deal on its own. We all need to step up to keep Cory's voice on the debate stage.
**[If you're ready to stand with Cory, please chip in to our campaign. Every dollar gets us closer to the December debate stage.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191121_BHQ_20191121-fr-BHQ-numbers-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
As the boss said last night, "it's time we fight, and fight together."
Jenna
Jenna Lowenstein
Deputy Campaign Manager
Cory 2020

Cory hasn 't qualified for the December debate yet because he needs 4% in four polls, and we need to capitalize on this moment to get him there. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" It's critical that we make the December debate -- it's why we're launching ads in the early states to introduce more folks to Cory to get the polling numbers we need. But all this requires a lot of resources, and a killer debate performance won't seal the deal on its own. We all need to step up to keep Cory's voice on the debate stage. "="** As the boss said last night, "it's time we fight, and fight together." Jenna Jenna Lowenstein Deputy Campaign Manager Cory 2020 "=" P.S. Check out this ActBlue screenshot of where our donations came in from (hint: there 's a dot on all fifty states!) "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved. Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible. If you got this message from a friend, "" This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on "", "", and "". It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe "". Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info "".

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We can't allow offshore drilling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, While Democrats are focused on impeachment and voting Trump out in 2020, he's using every possible moment to cause as much damage as possible \-- especially with his environmental policies. Trump has gutted emissions standards, expanded logging and mining, and now, he wants to expand offshore drilling into the Atlantic. Expanding offshore drilling would be devastating to our environment and coastal economies, and the GOP knows it, but all they care about are corporate donations. They may not care about the future of our planet or the health of our children, but America does. Joe Cunningham, a Democrat, flipped an R+10 district in South Carolina in 2018 on a platform opposing offshore drilling with support from pro-environment Republicans. If everyone raises their voices and speaks out, it can cause real change. [**We need everyone who cares to tell the Trump administration that we will not let our shores, beaches, and town be polluted by oil just so they can get an extra dime in their pockets. If you agree, you 've got to make your voice heard today -- you can make a difference.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc6/6e9863e8/168ac5c3/1db0ae59/3892172372/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/wdtop/") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc6/6e9863e8/168ac5c3/1db0ae59/3892172372/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/wdtop/")

name: TULSI 2020
subject: She will never toe the line
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12099617/124021085/1624370312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTk3NjRkMC1jMDBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-Cr4KecISEGAbLSVA4YLe-57rg1Y0PJjp5bzjJfQc8=&emci=649764d0-c00c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=659764d0-c00c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311)
---
| Friend— Last night’s presidential debate once again showed the bias in this primary that is set up to favor those who toe the line, and punish candidates like Tulsi who refuse to go along with the status quo. Despite promises of equal time, NBC’s media hosts once again tried to stifle her voice — directing three questions at Elizabeth Warren before Tulsi received even one. Mainstream establishment media darlings like Kamala Harris and Pete Buttigieg dedicated their time to going after Tulsi with baseless and undemocratic attacks. First for daring to go on Fox News, and then for daring to champion diplomacy and pledging to meet with whoever is necessary to prevent war and ensure peace and national security. Despite their best attempts, it didn’t work — again. Tulsi was once again the most googled candidate of the night, and with the little time she had she demonstrated the courage, aloha and leadership that our country so badly needs from its next President. **Check out the 8 minutes of video that had more people googling Tulsi’s name — again! — than any other candidate,[and then let’s prove once more the strength of our movement of, by and for the people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12099618/124021086/2101272486?refcode=em191121_ask&refcode2=659764d0-c00c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTk3NjRkMC1jMDBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-Cr4KecISEGAbLSVA4YLe-57rg1Y0PJjp5bzjJfQc8=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12099619/124021087/2101272486?refcode=em191121_video&refcode2=659764d0-c00c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTk3NjRkMC1jMDBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-Cr4KecISEGAbLSVA4YLe-57rg1Y0PJjp5bzjJfQc8=) Tulsi’s closing remarks laid out her promise to each and every one of us: | “My personal commitment to you, to all of my fellow Americans, is to treat you with respect and compassion, something that we in Hawaii call Aloha. Every single person deserves to be treated with respect regardless of race, religion, or gender, or even your politics. Inclusion, unity, respect, aloha — these will be the operating principles for my administration. Now Dr Martin Luther King visited Hawaii first back in 1959 where he expressed his appreciation for what we call the Aloha spirit. He said we look to you for inspiration as a bold example, for what you have already succeeded in the areas of racial harmony and racial justice where we are still struggling to achieve in other sections of the country. He later went on to say, as I looked out at the various faces in various colors mingled together like the waters of the sea, I see only one face — the face of the future. Working side-by-side, let’s defeat the divisiveness of Donald Trump, come together and usher in a 21st-century of racial harmony, of racial justice, peace, inclusion and true equality. Working side-by-side, let’s make Dr. King‘s dream a reality”
---
If this is a vision you’re proud to get behind, [please show your support by chipping in now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12099620/124021088/2101272486?refcode=em191121_ask2&refcode2=659764d0-c00c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTk3NjRkMC1jMDBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-Cr4KecISEGAbLSVA4YLe-57rg1Y0PJjp5bzjJfQc8=)
TULSI2020
[WATCH & DONATE » ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12099622/124021090/2101272486?refcode=em191121_button2&refcode2=659764d0-c00c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTk3NjRkMC1jMDBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-Cr4KecISEGAbLSVA4YLe-57rg1Y0PJjp5bzjJfQc8= "Watch and donate")

It is one way we come together as a community of progressives to make change in this world. If you would like to receive less emails like this one, you can [update your email preferences here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/649764d0-c00c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/659764d0-c00c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTk3NjRkMC1jMDBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-Cr4KecISEGAbLSVA4YLe-57rg1Y0PJjp5bzjJfQc8=&id=101199451&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Should you want to unsubscribe—and we would hate to see you leave—[go here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/649764d0-c00c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/659764d0-c00c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTk3NjRkMC1jMDBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-Cr4KecISEGAbLSVA4YLe-57rg1Y0PJjp5bzjJfQc8=&id=101199451&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Finally, if you believe we need to end the culture of corruption and greed in Washington, [then now is the time to make a contribution to TULSI 2020](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12099623/124021091/-885410603?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTk3NjRkMC1jMDBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-Cr4KecISEGAbLSVA4YLe-57rg1Y0PJjp5bzjJfQc8=). If you'd like to make a recurring contribution to TULSI 2020, [please click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12099624/124021092/-885410603?recurring=yes&refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTk3NjRkMC1jMDBjLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-Cr4KecISEGAbLSVA4YLe-57rg1Y0PJjp5bzjJfQc8=).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: losing your voice - debate last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Last night's debate was exactly what we all expected. It was yet another long-winded exchange about how each candidate would fund their health care plan. The candidates traded more jabs about who "can win a general election," which is just their euphemism for appealing to a less diverse electorate than what will be required to put a Democrat in the White House. [What we didn't expect was the outpouring of donations from across the country and the huge spike in internet searches for the campaign. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

But here’s a quick rundown of why FIRST: Speaker Pelosi and Adam Schiff bravely called for an impeachment inquiry after Trump tried to BRIBE the Ukrainian president. THEN: Trump LOST. HIS. MIND. He viciously attacked our diplomats and military servicemembers on Twitter after they courageously testified! Enough is enough, Peter. We need to amp up public pressure right away and hold Republicans accountable. subject: Unconscionable.

| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate?utm_source=2019-11-21_post-debate-non-signer&source=2019-11-21_post-debate-non-signer&utm_campaign=post-debate-non-signer&utm_medium=undefined&t=3&akid=7992%2E868730%2E2z6jKZ) Friend, Five Democratic debates. Ten candidates left on stage. And still, _just one question on climate change._ Climate change has been the topic of less than 10% of the questions asked at each of the previous four debates, and this one was no different. It's clear the candidates are ready to talk climate -- everyone from Mayor Buttigieg to Senators Warren and Sanders to Andrew Yang brought it up in their answers to unrelated questions -- but it's also clear neither the moderators nor the party thinks this is a priority. **It's unconscionable. This is the greatest existential threat of our time, and yet, still -- nothing.** **This will only change if we come together and demand it does.** [**Before next month's DNC debate, add your name to demand climate-focused questions and answers be a priority for candidates, moderators, and party leadership.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate?utm_source=2019-11-21_post-debate-non-signer&source=2019-11-21_post-debate-non-signer&utm_campaign=post-debate-non-signer&utm_medium=undefined&t=4&akid=7992%2E868730%2E2z6jKZ) Very truly yours, Jay | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-climate-debate?utm_source=2019-11-21_post-debate-non-signer&source=2019-11-21_post-debate-non-signer&utm_campaign=post-debate-non-signer&utm_medium=undefined&t=5&akid=7992%2E868730%2E2z6jKZ)

| Peter,

Last night's Democrat debate was crazy.

The candidates seemed obsessed with one-upping each other with more and more extreme policies.

Here's just a few of the insane plans they have for the American people.
* Federally-funded abortion on demand.
* Socialize the entire country's healthcare.
* Impeach President Trump.
* Legalize dangerous narcotics.
* Use taxpayer dollars for free four-year college.

None of these ideas are Oklahoma values, they're not American values either. The left is only interested in catering to their far-left base now, and it's why we can't let them win in 2020.

Flipping districts like ours red again is going to be the key to keeping the extremist Democrats out of power in 2020. [**Will you donate $5, $10, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 to help us turn this district red and stop far-left Democrats in 2020?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4c97c385be&e=795c6d9796)

| AP has called Oklahoma's 5th district "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020" and the Washington Post has rated this the number two race in the country. National Journal has gone one step further and says this is the nation's number one battleground district, and Decision Desk HQ has said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8d4f574877&e=795c6d9796)

clean_body: The extremist Democrats have to lose in 2020. | | | | | | | | "DONATE NOW" | Peter, Last night's Democrat debate was crazy. The candidates seemed obsessed with one-upping each other with more and more extreme policies. Here's just a few of the insane plans they have for the American people. Federally-funded abortion on demand. Socialize the entire country's healthcare. Impeach President Trump. Legalize dangerous narcotics. Use taxpayer dollars for free four-year college. None of these ideas are Oklahoma values, they're not American values either. The left is only interested in catering to their far-left base now, and it's why we can't let them win in 2020. Flipping districts like ours red again is going to be the key to keeping the extremist Democrats out of power in 2020. | "DONATE NOW" | AP has called Oklahoma's 5th district "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020" and the Washington Post has rated this the number two race in the country. National Journal has gone one step further and says this is the nation's number one battleground district, and Decision Desk HQ has said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections." Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. Best, \--Janet Barresi | "DONATE NOW" | | | Copyright © 2019 Janet for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi=20Sloan?=
subject: Beating Trump Isn't Enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI FOR CONGRESS
body:
We have to offer a vision for society to unite the working class. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bd5308264b9d/beating-trump-isnt-enough?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| |
---
| |
# ,

The betrayal of Donald Trump and his corrupt administration was laid bare yesterday during testimony before the House Intelligence Committee. **Donald Trump is hateful, criminal, and incompetent.** He, and everyone in his administration, deserve to be removed from office immediately. But career politicians see this as an opportunity to get off the hook. Even Democrats would rather talk about impeachment than have to take a position on the issues that matter most to working class Americans. We need national rent control. We need Medicare For All - the real deal, right now, not in three years and not a public option. We need a Green New Deal and to prosecute fossil fuel executives. We need an immediate moratorium on deportations and to abolish ICE. **And we need candidates who are committed to fighting for that vision.**
---
| [Support Our Campaign](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=2d391c50e6&e=c169cb0a8e "Support Our Campaign")
---
| That's how we're going to beat Trump and his allies in Washington. Impeachment grandstanding will not deliver these gains to us, only a fighting organized working class will. **When our people are struggling living paycheck to paycheck and unable to even pay attention to impeachment proceedings, there is a problem with our democracy, and I’m the only candidate in this race that understands that problem.** The problem is power, and until regular folks have power, our electeds simply won’t be able to win the fight against corruption and injustice. Stand with us to win the demands of the working class. That’s what I’ve been doing since before I was asking for votes, and that’s what we’ll do - together - when I'm in office. In solidarity, Heidi Sloan
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Our fundraising numbers are down slightly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Our government has been hijacked by the rich and powerful. It works better for big drug companies, than it does for seniors who are trying to fill a prescription. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528bcc/45c30650/11b0486f9/66f71bbf/2314231873/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
**Nothing will change until we tackle one problem head on: corruption.**

Our government has been hijacked by the rich and powerful. It works better for big drug companies, than it does for seniors who are trying to fill a prescription. It works better for a giant defense contracting industry, than it does for kids in our public schools. We have a government that works for those at the top -- and only those at the top.

**For too many, our democracy has _never_ worked -- so going back to business as usual won't be enough. Small nibbles around the edges won't be enough, either. The time for small ideas is over. We need big, structural change -- and I know how to get it done.**

I have the biggest anti-corruption plan since Watergate. It involves ending lobbying as we know it, blocking the revolving door between industry and Washington, and making everyone who runs for federal office puts their tax returns online. I've also pledged to never auction off ambassadorships to the highest bidder.

We can only make real progress on issues impacting our country and our planet if we root out this corruption.

**In this fight, no one can go it alone. We're building a grassroots movement that's going to put political and economic power into the hands of the people -- but it's only possible if we all do our part.**

**[Our fundraising numbers are down slightly this month compared to last, and it's powerfully important we get back on track so we can build the biggest grassroots movement possible. Will you make a contribution right now and be a part of this fight for big, structural change?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528bcc/45c30650/11b0486f9/66f71ba1/2314231873/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDk5Rl9ERUJfQ09SX0VfMjAxOTExMjFfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML99F_DEB_COR_E_20191121_V1S3_P")**

name: Charlie, Campaign Manager
subject: Hey, I’m Charlie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
I’ve had the privilege of working side-by-side with Mondaire for the last seven weeks, and I continue to be inspired by his dedication, integrity, and commitment to the people of New York’s 17th Congressional district. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/5AA/ni0YAA/t.2ww/jAEtzwv4STa7pfKg9_ka3g/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODI7wsnXHs-2Fumvhip5-2FSclhMlAyNXHr5RT8-2BKAhzwvyTL30r3-2FSKRQWWi6smeqih7HRJDMkgxp19ThElislXMQvjsJTMtbuIY-2F7ZmVq-2BvzDypa-2FIePwz3HRwQjXTvjQNA9H5q-2FdACR6yssH-2B8MzmicAZqcXxP95DXCIidC-2F0DpBuIR18H6RI36FWjtZCIFq5MOE8R-2FEiPZyajUY3LHxzqMLUNt95bUzOTWHGm4lyYv3oj8-3D/8i79)
Friend, I want to take a moment to introduce myself. I’m Charlie — Mondaire’s campaign manager! **I’ve had the privilege of working side-by-side with Mondaire for the last seven weeks, and I continue to be inspired by his dedication, integrity, and commitment to the people of New York’s 17th Congressional district.** He fought his whole childhood to defy the odds, and now he’s dedicating his life to being a champion for working families and children. **Part of my job is making sure Mondaire has the resources to get his message out to every single voter in the district, and right now,****_we are behind where we want to be on our fundraising._** Mondaire doesn’t accept a single dollar from corporate PACs, so we count on supporters like you to help us fund our campaign. **[Will you please chip in $5 to help fund our campaign clean_body: I’ve had the privilege of working side-by-side with Mondaire for the last seven weeks, and I continue to be inspired by his dedication, integrity, and commitment to the people of New York’s 17th Congressional district. | | | Friend, I want to take a moment to introduce myself. I’m Charlie — Mondaire’s campaign manager! I’ve had the privilege of working side-by-side with Mondaire for the last seven weeks, and I continue to be inspired by his dedication, integrity, and commitment to the people of New York’s 17th Congressional district. He fought his whole childhood to defy the odds, and now he’s dedicating his life to being a champion for working families and children. Part of my job is making sure Mondaire has the resources to get his message out to every single voter in the district, and right now,we are behind where we want to be on our fundraising. Mondaire doesn’t accept a single dollar from corporate PACs, so we count on supporters like you to help us fund our campaign. ** We have a real chance at electing a progressive, working-class champion to Congress. Mondaire knows we can’t afford to just tinker around the edges — we need bold solutions to deliver real change for working families. So far, we’ve seen how incredible the response has been to Mondaire’s message, but what we need right now is this enthusiasm to be reflected in our fundraising numbers. This is shaping up to be a crowded and competitive primary. Another candidate threw their hat into the ring earlier this week, which means we really need to start raising some serious numbers if we want to prove that Mondaire has the resources to be a competitive contender. ** Glad to have you on the team, Charlie Campaign Manager, Mondaire for Congress | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

the post-debate narrative is just as important as the debate itself Our Revolution

However, you wouldn't know it from watching the corporate media. That's why it's so important that we respond to their anti-Bernie propaganda with a show of grassroots power.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Less than a year to the 2020 election -- need to know where you stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, With the impeachment inquiry consuming the entire news cycle, it's sometimes hard to remember that there's a Democratic primary about to get underway. Last night, ten Democrats took the stage again to pitch America on why they should be the next president. Regardless of our differences, we need to make sure all Democrats are ready to come together to take back the White House in 2020. We want to hear directly from you, not the pollsters or prognosticators, about your plan for the next election: **Are you committed to voting against Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc8/6e9863e8/16846ee2/1db0a90c/3813616803/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Sv6J8xXL") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc8/6e9863e8/16846ee2/1db0a90c/3813616803/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Sv6J8xXL") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcc8/6e9863e8/16846ee2/1db0a912/3813616803/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191121d.ND-b&refcode2=OqA42f1w4dgcw7v91oJr")

"Oregon's budget in the 2016 campaign, as a person that was in charge of the state budget, was zero dollars and zero cents. We were not looking at Oregon. **But now we're here. We're already spending money."**
We need to step it up. _Molly_

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: Y'all, I am so proud right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, **Last night, Cory Booker showed America why he is going to be a fantastic president.** He spoke about bringing people together to make transformative change for our country -- channeling the common pain that so many Americans are facing into common purpose. It's the same powerful battle cry Cory's rallied around his entire career. This message deserves to continue being heard nationwide, but we haven't qualified for the December debate stage yet. We still need four polls at 4%, but we have a plan to get there. **We're launching ads into the early states to introduce voters and caucus-goers to Cory.[Can you chip in $5 right now to help fund our way to the December debate stage?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191121_AD_20191121-fr-AD-postdebate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I was proud of Cory the entire night, but especially when he talked about the failed War on Drugs, calling out hard truths. He addressed Vice President Joe Biden's comments against legalizing marijuana, reminding us that in our country, marijuana is already legal for privileged folks. **It 's crucial that the Democratic nominee understands that the failed War on Drugs has been a war on Black and Brown people.** Cory put it out there on stage last night, speaking for those who are often forgotten about and left voiceless by our nation's leaders. **But the reality is, that might have been his last shot on the national stage since our campaign hasn 't qualified for the December debate yet.** **[If you think Cory's voice belongs on that stage next month, we need your help. Chip in right now.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191121_AD_20191121-fr-AD-postdebate-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We can do this, Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191121_AD_20191121-fr-AD-postdebate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1f/5fca0d19/7938e273/291c5cf5/2684803533/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1f/5fca0d19/7938e273/291c5cf4/2684803533/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1f/5fca0d19/7938e273/291c5cf3/2684803533/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1f/5fca0d19/7938e273/291c5cf2/2684803533/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1f/5fca0d19/7938e273/291c5cf1/2684803533/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d1f/5fca0d19/7938e273/291c5cf5/2684803533/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Tulsi Gabbard last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Last night, we saw candidates on the stage fighting, but for what? Tulsi Gabbard made the debate stage last night, but she didn't use her platform to address public education. She didn't mention the poor. She didn't address the human tragedy at the border caused by the president's failed immigration policies. **It 's clear that the most critical issues to the most vulnerable among us will be ignored if we don't have folks bold enough to bring them up. ** I need your help to make sure I'm on the December debate stage. We're just shy of the 200,000 donors we need to meet the donor threshold for the debate. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: GCP
subject: an important update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
| | |
---
Friends - I have an important update for you: My opponent announced he has broken fundraising records thanks to Donald Trump helping funnel $3 MILLION into Michigan to defeat me, buy this seat and expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate.

They know that Democrats have ZERO chance of taking back the Senate if we lose in Michigan. **And now, a recent poll shows this race tied. **

But the good news is that Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats can take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan.
With the future of the Senate on the line, in a race this close, every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing.

And right now, we're falling $18,410 short of our must-hit $40,000 goal. **That's why a group of committed donors is matching all gifts, dollar for dollar, but only until midnight tonight! **
**Friends - with the Senate at stake, I'm counting on your immediate contribution: [Will you please give $3 or more and have every dollar DOUBLED to win in Michigan, take back the Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa6e/5721a3ed/71f984ab/efa9203/3927484082/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNDAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk140-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: They're sparing no expense.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
It's Mitch and Donald and Cory vs. this team. Let's show them we plan to fight back. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145d/691c9bd/6f9bed52/11a7dbce/1364695873/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| | Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are pulling out all the stops to hang on to this seat. **Chip in to help win it back:**

[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191121_JH_20191121-fr-JH-EOMlaunch-2mo_box_callout&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---

Friend,

November's been a game-changing month for this race.

**Democrats ' chances of winning back the Senate hinge on Colorado--and a lot of people have taken notice. Both _FiveThirtyEight_ and _Roll Call_ confirmed this is one of the most flippable Senate seats in the entire country, and _POLITICO_ just called our race a toss-up.**

In response, Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have ramped up their efforts to hang on to the majority. Here's just some of what they've been up to:
* Trump fundraised for senators who he's hoping will back him on impeachment, convincing his online supporters to donate over $100,000 to Cory Gardner.
* On top of that, Trump has been headlining high-dollar fundraisers in-person for Gardner.
* Mitch McConnell is calling in favors from special interests to direct dark money to races that will decide the Senate majority. **We expect them to spend big time here.**

That's all happening right now... and we're just under a year out! As Donald Trump gets more desperate over impeachment, and as Mitch McConnell gets more worried about losing his Senate majority, we can expect these efforts to get even more intense.

We've made big strides in closing the fundraising gap since we launched this campaign. But fighting back against their fundraising juggernaut is going to take a full team effort.

[**_Can you chip in for the first time to get a head start on our November monthly deadline?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191121_JH_20191121-fr-JH-EOMlaunch-2mo_boxndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
John

[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191121_JH_20191121-fr-JH-EOMlaunch-2mo_box_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145d/691c9bd/6f9bed52/11a7dbcb/1364695873/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145d/691c9bd/6f9bed52/11a7dbc8/1364695873/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145d/691c9bd/6f9bed52/11a7dbc9/1364695873/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145d/691c9bd/6f9bed52/11a7dbc6/1364695873/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145d/691c9bd/6f9bed52/11a7dbc7/1364695873/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145d/691c9bd/6f9bed52/11a7dbc4/1364695873/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377145d/691c9bd/6f9bed52/11a7dbcb/1364695873/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

| | Big news, team. Mike just released his thoughts on impeachment in a new digital ad. But we need your help to keep it up and running online. [**Click here to watch it, and chip in $5 to help us reach another 100 voters.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2423/33365068/4a63355d/3f8b88f7/4120804862/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitalad_imp?refcode=20191121_em_fr_tf_b1_all&amount=5") [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2423/33365068/4a63355d/3f8b88f0/4120804862/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitalad_imp?refcode=20191121_em_fr_tf_b1_all") Mike is **__the__** leader in this race, folks. He was the first to support the impeachment hearings, because he has the courage to speak against clear wrongdoing -- unlike his opponent -- who remains shamefully silent. Iowans deserve a senator like Admiral Mike Franken, a person who has maintained a security clearance for over 40 years, served over 36 years in the Navy, and knows how diplomacy is supposed to work. He speaks clearly about the Ukraine imbroglio just like he will act on what is best for Iowa and our nation. **Let 's keep this ad running and pressure Sen. Joni Ernst to finally do what's right, then let's bring some dignity back to Washington by voting in Admiral Michael Franken. [Can you chip in $5 to help us reach another 100 voters?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2423/33365068/4a63355d/3f8b88f1/4120804862/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitalad_imp?refcode=20191121_em_fr_tf_b1_all&amount=5")** Thank you, Team Franken

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: "Deaths are Good for Business” Claims Drug Dealer Freed by Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

One of the most alarming acts committed by this year’s Democrat-led state government – and there were A LOT – was sweeping changes to our criminal justice system.

Under the guise of “bail reform,” radically-regressive, downstate Democrats tipped the scales of justice dramatically against police, prosecutors, and victims in favor of criminals. I voted against these measures then and I continue to oppose them now.

Now, individuals who commit certain acts of domestic violence will be sent home and told to appear in court. Drug dealers whose substances kill members of our community will be issued an appearance ticket and sent right back to our streets to await trial. We’re supposed to cross our fingers and hope the domestic abusers and drug dealers will find it in their hearts to not commit any more crimes and that they will show up for court.

I introduce to you [José “Catano” Jorge](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=a97074ffd3&e=9f843ba602). Jose sold drugs that killed a 28-year-old, claimed deaths were "good for business," and endorsed Andrew Cuomo for President for letting him walk free. Jose clearly represents a grave danger to our communities, but under Democrats’ new policies, he’ll be right back amongst us.

I’m running for Congress to protect our communities and to fight the radically-regressive downstate Democrats that are waging war on our state and our communities. Please share this with your friends. Please [sign up on my website](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=4261554d9c&e=9f843ba602). Please [follow me on Facebook](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=2dde9c359b&e=9f843ba602). Please [consider a donation](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=3b2c0939f0&e=9f843ba602). I ask that you please join me in this fight.

Thank you and God Bless.
Rob
